summary.what: Cut v0.22.2: --batch anchor fix + gate fallback + direct docSet membership filter
summary.why: Patch release — closes Laura's actual root causes (--batch picking side-branch anchor; gate's LogFirstParent walking weird ranges; filterByRules missing direct docSet membership check). Three tightly-coupled correctness fixes that together resolve the merge-topology friction class without algorithm-level changes
summary.how: just release 0.22.2 generated the changelog via timbers draft changelog | claude -p --model opus, synced site/content/examples/, bumped the landing page badge, tagged v0.22.2, pushed; GH Actions handles binary publish
